title: set_contact_display_name returning bool: correct API fix
description: Changing set_contact_display_name from Result<()> to Result<bool> is correct: the old version bumped state_seq even when 0 rows were affected (spurious state token advance), and returned Ok(()) on not-found which made the caller falsely report success. The bool return makes the not-found case explicit at the type level and fixes both bugs. Defend against any suggestion to revert to Result<()> with an early Ok(()) return — that would re-introduce the silent false-success.
